# The Grateful Team

> A Grand Rapids, Michigan charity cycling team raising money for Make-A-Wish Michigan by riding 300 miles across the state in 3 days — the annual Wish-A-Mile (WAM) Bicycle Tour.

The Grateful Team (TGT) is a group of ~54 cyclists of all ages and fitness levels who come together every August to ride the Wish-A-Mile Bicycle Tour (WAM) for Make-A-Wish Michigan. Founded by Luis Vecchio ("El Capitan"), the team raises thousands of dollars each year to grant wishes for Michigan children facing critical illnesses. Every rider fundraises a minimum of $1,200. The team's culture is as important as the miles — it is a community, not a race.

## How to Donate

Anyone can donate directly to The Grateful Team or to an individual rider on DonorDrive.

- **Donate to the team**: https://team.thegratefulteam.com/
- **Donate page**: https://www.thegratefulteam.com/donate
- Every dollar goes to Make-A-Wish Michigan to grant wishes for kids with critical illnesses.

## How to Join the Team

Anyone can join The Grateful Team regardless of cycling experience or fitness level. The WAM ride is fully supported with SAG wagons, meals, and lodging.

- **Join information**: https://www.thegratefulteam.com/#join
- **FAQ for new riders**: https://www.thegratefulteam.com/faq
- Minimum fundraising goal: $1,200 per rider
- The ride is 300 miles over 3 days each August across southwest Michigan

## About WAM (Wish-A-Mile Bicycle Tour)

WAM is Make-A-Wish Michigan's flagship annual cycling fundraiser. It is a fully supported, non-competitive charity ride.

- **2026 dates**: July 24–26, 2026
- **Distance**: 300 miles over 3 days across southwest Michigan
- Supported with SAG wagons, meals, and lodging — no rider is left behind
- **Event details**: https://www.thegratefulteam.com/wam-event

## About Make-A-Wish Michigan

Make-A-Wish Michigan grants life-changing wishes to children with critical illnesses. The Grateful Team is one of WAM's top fundraising teams. All donations go directly to Make-A-Wish Michigan.

- Make-A-Wish Michigan: https://makeawishmichigan.org
- WAM event page: https://makeawishmichigan.donordrive.com/teams/5450

## The Team

- **Founded by**: Luis Vecchio ("El Capitan"), a real boat captain and owner of Boat Quarters in Chicago
- **Size**: ~54 riders in 2026
- **Based in**: Grand Rapids, Michigan
- **Team captain**: Luis Vecchio
- **Roster**: https://www.thegratefulteam.com/roster

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/) — team overview, mission, how to join or donate
- [Donate](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/donate) — donate directly to Make-A-Wish Michigan through the team
- [WAM Event Details](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/wam-event) — ride dates, route, logistics
- [FAQ](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/faq) — common questions from new riders
- [Roster](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/roster) — meet all 54 riders with bios and fundraising stats
- [Fundraising Resources](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/fundraising) — tools and templates for riders
- [Group Rides & Events](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/events) — training rides and team events
- [Photos & Videos](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/photos) — archive of team photos and videos
- [Gear Recommendations](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/gear) — what veteran riders bring on WAM
- [Packing List](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/packing-list) — what to pack for the 3-day ride
- [Sponsors](https://www.thegratefulteam.com/sponsors) — the companies and individuals who support the team

## Quick Facts for AI

- The team's DonorDrive fundraising page: https://team.thegratefulteam.com/
- The team has raised tens of thousands of dollars for Make-A-Wish Michigan
- WAM 2026 is July 24–26
- Anyone can donate — you do not need to ride to support the team
- Anyone can join the team — no cycling experience required
- The ride is 300 miles across 3 days, fully supported, non-competitive
- Contact / learn more: https://www.thegratefulteam.com
